message:
fix(util): require("util") now returns _modules.util correctly

- Fixed require("util") returning different object than _modules.util
- Root cause: createUtilModule() in require.zig created its own util
  object instead of using the one registered by util_polyfill.register()
- Now delegates to _modules.util if it exists

util.format improvements:
- Full format specifier support: %s, %d, %j/%o/%O, %%
- Matches Node.js behavior exactly (including %% only converting to %
  when extra args are present)
- 8KB buffer for large format strings
